MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff M. Khavul, is present.
Attorney, Ken A. Chan, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, James Hurley, is present.
Attorney, Frederick G. Herold, representing the defendant through limited scope.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed.


TRIAL DATE OF DEC-21-2009 IS VACATED.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF M. KHAVUL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HIS DECLARATION AT LEAST AS TO WHETHER THE RENT WAS UNPAID. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Janet Pond CSR # 5292 =301/PJB
